sections.paragraph:
to be marked out, to be described (a border); followed by אֶל … מִן, ־ָה (from … unto), Jos 15:9, 11 Jos 15:11 18:14 , 17 Jos 18:17. Others take it actively, to describe.

Piel to describe, to delineate, Isa 44:13.

Pual מְתֹאָר Jos 19:13, “Rimmon הַמְּתֹאָר הַנֵּעָה which pertains to Neah.” Hence-
